passive_keystone_resolute_technique.name: Resolute Technique
passive_keystone_resolute_technique.flavour_text: Great tacticians learn that consistency often trumps potential.

passive_keystone_giants_blood.name: Giant's Blood
passive_keystone_giants_blood.flavour_text: The Titans did not vanish from this world. Their might lives on - in you.

passive_keystone_unwavering_stance_.name: Unwavering Stance
passive_keystone_unwavering_stance_.flavour_text:
Stand your ground, child, keep your senses.
The pain is fleeting, but victory is forever.

passive_keystone_avatar_of_fire.name: Avatar of Fire
passive_keystone_avatar_of_fire.flavour_text: "In my dreams I see a great warrior, his skin scorched black, his fists aflame."

passive_keystone_blood_magic.name: Blood Magic
passive_keystone_blood_magic.flavour_text: Lay open your veins, and draw power from your own spilled life.

passive_keystone_zealots_oath.name: Zealot's Oath
passive_keystone_zealots_oath.flavour_text: Tear my flesh and splinter my bones. You will never break my spirit.

passive_keystone_ancestral_bond.name: Ancestral Bond
passive_keystone_ancestral_bond.flavour_text:
A wooden construct, mute and blind.
But fear the wrath of shackled mind.

passive_keystone_pain_attunement.name: Pain Attunement
passive_keystone_pain_attunement.flavour_text:
Embrace the pain, drink it in.
Your enemies will know your agony tenfold.

passive_keystone_chaos_inoculation.name: Chaos Inoculation
passive_keystone_chaos_inoculation.flavour_text: Give up everything in pursuit of greatness - even life itself.

passive_keystone_eldritch_battery__.name: Eldritch Battery
passive_keystone_eldritch_battery__.flavour_text:
What need have I for defence when my enemies
are reduced to ash and splinters?

passive_keystone_mind_over_matter.name: Mind Over Matter
passive_keystone_mind_over_matter.flavour_text: While the mind endures, so too will the body.

passive_keystone_whispers_of_doom.name: Whispers of Doom
passive_keystone_whispers_of_doom.flavour_text: Your grandchildren will awaken screaming in memory of what I utter today.

passive_keystone_necromantic_talisman.name: Necromantic Talisman
passive_keystone_necromantic_talisman.flavour_text: I give you everything, my pets. Do not disappoint me.

passive_keystone_conduit.name: Conduit
passive_keystone_conduit.flavour_text: To me, brave companions! Feel my radiance flow through you!

passive_keystone_ghost_reaver_.name: [UNUSED] Ghost Reaver
passive_keystone_ghost_reaver_.flavour_text: I will wear your ghost, and you will die twice: against me, and for me.

passive_keystone_resonance.name: Resonance
passive_keystone_resonance.flavour_text: The notes may change, but the song remains the same.

passive_keystone_eternal_youth.name: Eternal Youth
passive_keystone_eternal_youth.flavour_text: Burn the spirit to vitalise the flesh.

passive_keystone_acrobatics.name: Primal Hunger
passive_keystone_acrobatics.flavour_text: The irrepressible spirit of the wilds burns within you, roaring to be let loose.

passive_keystone_dance_with_death.name: Dance with Death
passive_keystone_dance_with_death.flavour_text: You circle the black scorpion with enmity, daring it time and again.

passive_keystone_heartstopper.name: Heartstopper
passive_keystone_heartstopper.flavour_text: Skip a beat, hold your breath. Too slow a poison, only death.

passive_keystone_oasis.name: Oasis
passive_keystone_oasis.flavour_text: The fewer there are, the less you have to share.

passive_keystone_vaal_pact.name: Vaal Pact
passive_keystone_vaal_pact.flavour_text:
My ancestral pact was sealed. Forevermore, I would gain sustenance
only from the ravaged flesh of my enemies.

passive_keystone_iron_reflexes_.name: Iron Reflexes
passive_keystone_iron_reflexes_.flavour_text: Why should I dodge blows that I do not fear?

passive_keystone_glancing_blows_.name: Glancing Blows
passive_keystone_glancing_blows_.flavour_text: Utter trust in your defence unleashes ultimate potential.

passive_keystone_elemental_equilibrium.name: Elemental Equilibrium
passive_keystone_elemental_equilibrium.flavour_text: Balance is good in all things, but especially in the realm of magic.

passive_keystone_bulwark.name: Bulwark
passive_keystone_bulwark.flavour_text: In battle, certainty is worth a little pain.

passive_keystone_crimson_dance_.name: Crimson Assault
passive_keystone_crimson_dance_.flavour_text: Each nick and cut brings death one step closer.

passive_keystone_two_companions.name: Trusted Kinship
passive_keystone_two_companions.flavour_text: Bonds forged in battle surpass ties of blood.

passive_keystone_hollow_palm_technique.name: Hollow Palm Technique
passive_keystone_hollow_palm_technique.flavour_text: The body is a weapon waiting to be mastered.

passive_keystone_fire_spells_to_chaos.name: Blackflame Covenant
passive_keystone_fire_spells_to_chaos.flavour_text:
Let the Darkness consume you.
Beyond the veil of death,
there burns a black fire.

passive_keystone_auto_invocation.name: Ritual Cadence
passive_keystone_auto_invocation.flavour_text: A properly disciplined mind gives rise to structured thought.

passive_keystone_ignore_shapeshift_restr.name: Chimeral Blood
passive_keystone_ignore_shapeshift_restr.flavour_text: All animals share common ancestors. You carry them within you still.

passive_keystone_alternate_es_recovery.name: Scarred Faith
passive_keystone_alternate_es_recovery.flavour_text: Hope is a mistake. Pain is the only truth.

passive_keystone_lord_of_the_wilds.name: Lord of the Wilds
passive_keystone_lord_of_the_wilds.flavour_text: Strength begets respect. There is no simpler law.

passive_keystone_wildsurge_incantation.name: Wildsurge Incantation
passive_keystone_wildsurge_incantation.flavour_text:
The world is a pattern, moving in natural waves.
With enough force, those waves can be made to converge...

AscendancyWitch3Small8.name: Energy Shield if Consumed Power Charge

AscendancyAltWitch3Small8.name: Energy Shield if Consumed Power Charge

AscendancySorceress2Small8.name: Cast Speed and Area of Effect

AscendancySorceress3Notable7.name: Barya of Navira
AscendancySorceress3Notable7.flavour_text:
"You knew the twisted plan these fools devised. As Tale Woman, you are their compass in the sandstorm. Yet... you did not act. And now we mourn these honoured dead. You must pay."
 
Varashta condemned Navira to the ritual of the barya, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.

AscendancySorceress3Notable8.name: Barya of Kelari
AscendancySorceress3Notable8.flavour_text:
"And you... there was no excuse for your actions. You defiled them! You have tainted the very sands with the blood of your own! Yet the war rages on. You have achieved nothing. You must pay." 

Varashta condemned Kelari to the ritual of the barya, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.

AscendancySorceress3Notable9.name: Barya of Ruzhan
AscendancySorceress3Notable9.flavour_text:
"You have forsaken your duty to my akhara. Yes... we do not abide weakness. But we also do not abide madness in the fervour of battle! Your slain dekhara will have their justice. You must pay." 

Varashta condemned Ruzhan to the ritual of the barya, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.

AscendancySorceress3Notable10_.name: Navira's Fracturing
AscendancySorceress3Notable10_.flavour_text:
"My heart was fractured. I believed Kelari's words. I knew not his true nature... his ambition. I convinced Ruzhan there were cowards among his ranks. I failed you. And I accept my fate." 

Navira confessed her failure to Varashta.

AscendancySorceress3Notable11.name: Navira's Well
AscendancySorceress3Notable11.flavour_text:
"Wipe the tears from your face, dear Navira. I did not deceive you. I meant every word. I will forever cherish you, my beloved. Know that I did it all for you... for our future!" 

Kelari pleaded with the Tale Woman.

AscendancySorceress3Notable12_.name: Navira's Oasis
AscendancySorceress3Notable12_.flavour_text:
"Kelari, you deceiver! I fell for your words, but no longer. Your sentence is a fate too good for you! I would give anything to bring back those who fell to your lies. Instead... I mourn my choices." 

Navira lambasted Kelari a final time.

AscendancySorceress3Notable13.name: Kelari's Deception
AscendancySorceress3Notable13.flavour_text:
"Listen not to his simpering words, he means to languish before you to weaken your resolve! He is duplicitous. An assassin, thriving on deception and lies. His lust for power is what drove his choice!" 

Outrage trembled in Ruzhan's voice at the sentencing.

AscendancySorceress3Notable14.name: Kelari's Judgment
AscendancySorceress3Notable14.flavour_text:
"Knowing where and when to plunge your knife is more important than the sharpness of your blade. I will not forget my error... and I will be a living example of your wisdom, dear Sekhema." 

Kelari accepted Varashta's sentence and committed himself to her.

AscendancySorceress3Notable15.name: Kelari's Malediction
AscendancySorceress3Notable15.flavour_text:
"The snare was set on our fallen. Beetles burst from their flesh, flooding the sands. Their exploding carapaces halted the advancing enemy... but it was not enough. And for that... I grieve." 

Kelari admitted his wrongdoing to Varashta.

AscendancySorceress3Notable16.name: Ruzhan's Trap
AscendancySorceress3Notable16.flavour_text:
"I have seen countless battles. I know war! The taste of defeat... The taste of victory! But in this war... everything is at stake. So yes, those you speak of will know my blade. I will do whatever I must!" 

Ruzhan confided in his Tale-Woman, Navira.

AscendancySorceress3Notable17.name: Ruzhan's Reckoning
AscendancySorceress3Notable17.flavour_text:
"I stand before you, as your humble servant. Though I was betrayed, I would do it all again, if it would have saved us. But I accept your sentence. I will atone. I pledge myself to you... forevermore." 

Ruzhan accepted his fate at the barya ritual site.

AscendancySorceress3Notable18.name: Ruzhan's Fury
AscendancySorceress3Notable18.flavour_text:
"Yes... they fell by my blade and fire lashed them for their betrayal! No dekhara is exempt from fighting back the Winter before us. Lest they too know the Doom of the Desert!" 

Ruzhan fumed at Varashta, in pure defiance.

AtlasGenericKeystone1.name: Corrupted Infusion
AtlasGenericKeystone1.flavour_text: We seek to cleanse Corruption, not intensify it, but there may be merit to a paradoxical strategy.

AtlasGenericKeystone2.name: Unstable Energies
AtlasGenericKeystone2.flavour_text: Overcharge the machine at your own risk.

AtlasGenericKeystone3.name: Ecological Shift
AtlasGenericKeystone3.flavour_text: Everything changes in the wake of Corruption.

AtlasDeliriumNotable2.name: Would you like to see my face?

AtlasDeliriumNotable3.name: You can't just wake up from this one.

AtlasDeliriumNotable7_.name: It's not real, it's not real!
